message:
style(engine): apply rustfmt formatting and add missing EOF newlines

Mechanical formatting pass — no behavioral changes:

- ambient_authority.rs: Remove trailing whitespace on line 523.
- array_fast_lane.rs: Break long serde_json method chain across
  multiple lines per rustfmt wrapping rules.
- runtime_diagnostics_cli.rs: Reformat SUPPORTED_PREFIXES.iter().any()
  closure to standard rustfmt layout.
- safe_mode_fallback.rs: Break long if-condition across lines per
  rustfmt max-width.
- test_audit_bypass.rs: Normalize trailing whitespace on blank lines,
  add missing newline at end of file.
- test_sqrt_bug.rs: Add missing newline at end of file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
